## PiWsConfigLoaderOptions.envName property

Optional environment name used for c12's `$development`<!-- -->, `$production`<!-- -->, and `$env` sections.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly envName?: string | false;
```

## Default Value

`process.env.NODE_ENV`
